add-multiple-digital-signatures.title: Add Multiple Digital Signatures to PDF
add-multiple-digital-signatures.description: Demonstrates adding a second digital signature on page three of a PDF using a different rectangle area.

configure-signature-custom-appearance.title: Configure Custom Signature Appearance with Foreground Image and Background Color
configure-signature-custom-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to set a foreground image and background color for a digital signature using SignatureCustomAppearance before signing a PDF.

suppress-signature-text.title: Suppress Signature Reason, Contact, and Location in PDF
suppress-signature-text.description: Demonstrates how to create a digital signature with empty reason, contact, and location fields using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-signature-caption-language-french.title: Set Signature Caption Language to French
set-signature-caption-language-french.description: Demonstrates how to change the language of a digital signature caption to French using SignatureCustomAppearance.

remove-pdf-signature.title: Remove Specific Signature from PDF
remove-pdf-signature.description: Demonstrates how to remove a digital signature named 'ApprovalSignature' from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-pdf-signature.title: Verify PDF Signature 'ContractSigner'
verify-pdf-signature.description: Shows how to check if a PDF contains a digital signature named 'ContractSigner' and verify its validity using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-manager-signature.title: Validate ManagerSignature Field in PDF
validate-manager-signature.description: Demonstrates how to verify the cryptographic integrity of the ManagerSignature field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-signing-certificate.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature Field
extract-signing-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to extract the X.509 certificate from a signature field named 'LegalSignature' in a PDF and save it as a .cer file.

extract-signature-image.title: Extract Signature Field Image to PNG
extract-signature-image.description: Extracts the image from a signature form field named 'WitnessSignature' and saves it as a PNG file.

custom-signature-appearance.title: Create Custom Signature Appearance without Default Caption
custom-signature-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field with a custom appearance that hides the default "Digitally signed by" label.

remove-signature-error-handling.title: Remove Specific Signature with Error Handling
remove-signature-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to safely remove a named digital signature from a PDF, handling the case where the signature does not exist.

verify-pdf-signatures.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Log Results to JSON
verify-pdf-signatures.description: Loads a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature, and writes the signature name and validation status to a JSON file.

sign-pdf-reason-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason and Location
sign-pdf-reason-location.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF and set the signature reason and location using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-field-and-sign.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-signature-field-and-sign.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field to a PDF page and then signing it using a PKCS#1 certificate.

extract-certificate-details.title: Extract Certificate Issuer and Expiration from Signed PDF
extract-certificate-details.description: Demonstrates how to read a digital signature from a PDF, extract its X.509 certificate, and display the issuer and expiration date.

pdf-signature-report.title: Generate PDF Signature Report
pdf-signature-report.description: Creates a PDF report that lists all digital signatures in a document, their signers, and verification results.

retry-pdf-signing.title: Retry Signing PDF When File Is Locked
retry-pdf-signing.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with a retry mechanism that handles file‑locking by another process.

remove-pdf-signatures.title: Remove All Signatures from PDF
remove-pdf-signatures.description: Demonstrates how to remove all digital signatures from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade and save a clean copy.

verify-multiple-signatures.title: Verify Multiple Signatures in PDF
verify-multiple-signatures.description: Loads a signed PDF, lists all signature names and verifies each using VerifySigned.

extract-signature-images-html-report.title: Extract Signature Images and Generate HTML Report
extract-signature-images-html-report.description: Loads a PDF, extracts images of digital signatures, saves them as JPEG files, and creates an HTML report that displays each signature image.

signature-appearance-semi-transparent.title: Configure Signature Appearance with Semi-Transparent Background
signature-appearance-semi-transparent.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom signature appearance with a semi‑transparent background color using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

list-pdf-signature-names.title: List Signature Names in PDF
list-pdf-signature-names.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve and display all digital signature names from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-image.title: Sign PDF with Image Signature
sign-pdf-with-image.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using an image as the signature appearance via PdfFileSignature.

sign-pdf-visible-last-page.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
sign-pdf-visible-last-page.description: Demonstrates adding a visible digital signature to the bottom‑right corner of the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-and-resign-pdf.title: Remove Existing Signature and Re‑sign PDF with Updated Certificate
remove-and-resign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing digital signatures from a PDF and then apply a new signature using a different certificate.

verify-no-signature.title: Verify PDF Without Signatures Returns False
verify-no-signature.description: Demonstrates checking a PDF that has no digital signatures using PdfFileSignature.VerifySigned, which returns false.

remove-pdf-signatures__v2.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs in a Directory Recursively
remove-pdf-signatures__v2.description: Demonstrates how to recursively locate PDF files in a directory and remove all digital signatures from each file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-certificate-serial-number.title: Extract Signing Certificate Serial Number from PDF
extract-certificate-serial-number.description: Demonstrates how to extract the X.509 signing certificate from a signed PDF and log its serial number for audit purposes.

list-signature-reason-location.title: List Signature Reason and Location from PDF
list-signature-reason-location.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate digital signatures in a PDF and output each signature's reason and location metadata for auditing.

hidden-pdf-signature.title: Apply Hidden Digital Signature to PDF
hidden-pdf-signature.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with a digital signature while hiding its visual appearance.
